reach_why: Extends familiar fallibilist and search-bias ideas; little genuinely unprecedented explanatory territory appears.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links hard-to-vary selection, candidate-pool composition, abolished categories, and affective misreading.
falsifiable_why: Test by varying pool composition and rigidity timing; check whether novelty and obsolete categories persist.
explanation: Miscomposed search spaces and premature rigidity make systems recycle old concepts while seeming original.
